name: SUN_GTIL2 Grid Tie Inverter
description: The `sun_gtil2` component allows you to get voltage, power and temperature readings from your `SUN-1000G2` or `SUN-2000G2` grid tie inverter. This is done by reading the UART data transmitted from the inverter's controller board to the display board.

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: The UART Bus ID for receiving messages sent from the inverter's controller to the display.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this component.
